summary: P1.8-10 journey link registry: maps all six ADR-026 workflow_id values to Home metric anchors, Reason/Anticipation copy templates, and deep-link helpers. Pure mock data; no backend changes.

interfaceChanges.description: Lookup workflow_id to report domain, metric key, reward label, and copy templates.
Deep-link builders for RRAA cross-screen navigation query params.
Validate highlight query params; invalid values return null without throwing.

mappings.criterion: Unit test covers all six ADR-026 workflow_id values
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_journey_loop_registry.test.ts::defines a non-empty journey link for every ADR-026 workflow_id

mappings.criterion: Each workflow has non-empty reportDomain metricKey rewardLabel reasonTemplate anticipationTemplate
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_journey_loop_registry.test.ts::defines a non-empty journey link for every ADR-026 workflow_id

mappings.criterion: Growth persona links product_scaling budget_optimization refund_spike_detection
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_journey_loop_registry.test.ts::maps growth persona workflows to the PRD Home metric anchors
web/src/__tests__/test_journey_loop_registry.test.ts::maps new-shop workflows to the PRD Home metric anchors

mappings.criterion: Invalid highlight params return null without throwing
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_journey_loop_registry.test.ts::returns null for invalid highlight params without throwing

mappings.criterion: MODULE.md documents the registry public interface
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_journey_loop_registry.test.ts::exports journey registry helpers from the operations public interface
